name: davinci
description: davinci coding toolkit. Bundles four skills: capture — quickly drop a product need into Linear as a titled, labelled, milestoned backlog stub without speccing it out; spec — turn plain-language product needs into clean Linear specs (interview, draft, refine, prioritize, approve); tech-refine — the pre-build clarity gate that walks a signed-off capability's requirements and sends plain-language questions back to the Expert wherever the spec isn't yet enough to build on; and layer-cake — decide which architectural layer or namespace code belongs in for projects organized as a one-directional dependency spine plus a cross-cutting axis.
